title: BotanicPledge
description: A Minecraft Botania Addon Mod which adds Norse Content
body:
Botanic Pledge - A Norse Expansion to Botania's World

As of Version 0.7.4 the mod offers an integration for:

Expanded Combat by Userofbricks:
    Add more weapons and equipment 
MythicBotany by noeppi_noeppi:
    Makes the game a lot harder since it first requires to obtain Alfsteel
Better Combat [Fabric & Forge] by daedelus_dev
    Weapon animations & Behavior

    
Botanic Pledge is an exciting addon to the well-known Botania mod, giving access to more norse  artifacts and powerful rituals. Immerse yourself in the mysteries of Yggdrasil —The legendary World Tree— and discover new ways to enhance your gameplay with the expansion on Botania’s core mechanics

Key Features:

Yggdrasilsteel Gear: Strengthen your arsenal with armor and weapons crafted from Yggdrasilsteel, a divine material from the World Tree itself. Use mythic weapons like the Yggd Ramus and the legendary Warden of Yggdrasil — All designed to complement and extend your Botania experience.

Runes of the Norse Gods: Expand on Botania's mystical system with new runes like the Rune of Thurisaz and Rune of Laguz. These runes, grant the ability to craft powerful weapons and artifacts which can be enchanced through the Modification Altar.

Legendary Artifacts: Beyond the treasures of Botania, Botanic Pledge introduces divine artifacts like the Ring of Aesir, combining the powers of Loki, Thor, and Odin into a single godly relic. Equip Ull's Bow, capable of teleporting you across the Nine Worlds, or the Conquering Sash, enabling incredible speed and agility.

Botanic Rituals: Take crafting to the next level with ancient rituals that unlock new, powerful items. Utilize Yggdralium Shards to perform Botanic Rituals at a completely new Ritual Structure to create artifacts that surpass anything ever seen.

Epic Boss Fights: Ready for a tougher challenge than Botania's Gaia Guardians? Face the ferocious Yggdrasil Guardian, a boss that demands the best gear and skill to defeat. Arm yourself with powerful relics and test your mettle in these legendary encounters.

Advanced Mana Manipulation: Botanic Pledge builds upon Botania's mana system, introducing new items like the Yggdral Spreader and the Mana Buffer, allowing you to store and transport mana more efficiently than ever before. Harness the energy of lightning through the Thunder Lily to generate massive amounts of mana.

Expanded Crafting: Use Botania’s crafting mechanics in tandem with new divine rituals. Create legendary items like the Soul Amulet or manipulate the essence of beings using the Soul Shard. 
Botanic Pledge extends the beloved mechanics of Botania into the realm of Nordic mythology. Whether you’re gathering World Ash Branches from Yggdrasil, performing divine rituals, or crafting epic weapons, your journey will take you deeper into the fabric of the Norse cosmos.
